examples: According to the experiment result, the fluidized drying method is suited for the drying of zymotic orange peels.
Purpose To study the effect and its mechanism of zymotic fluid of Polypor Laetiporus (ZPL) on the muscular tension of the isolated ileum of guinea pig.
Take foramen magnum resin D101 to separate polysaccharide from the zymotic fluid of Cordyceps mycelium, the phenol-SO2 method to measure polysaccharide in sample.
